title: Mystical Garden Cloches
description: A compatibility addon that lets you automate Mystical Agriculture using Immersive Engineering's Garden Cloche
body:
### Grow Mystical Agriculture crops in Immersive Engineering Garden Cloches! _A compatibility addon that lets you automate Mystical Agriculture using Immersive Engineering's Garden Cloche_ ---
Supported Seeds: - 🌟 **All Basic Mystical Agriculture Seeds**: Inferium, Prosperity, Iron, etc.. - 🔮 **Mod Compatibility**: Create, AE2, Botania, Draconic Evolution, ++
--- ### 📦 Requirements

Immersive Engineering
Mystical Agriculture
---

Automate your magical farming with industrial efficiency!
